results.definition_en: A shape made when two lines come together at a point.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 角;兩線於同一點相交所成的圖形。
results.example_en: The table has sharp angles on the side.

results.definition_en: A very small black or red insect that lives in groups in the earth.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 螞蟻;群居於地下的小型黑色或紅色昆蟲。
results.example_en: An ant ran across the table.

results.definition_en: A round, sweet fruit, often red or green, that grows on a tree.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 蘋果;圓形味甜、生長於樹上的水果，常為紅或綠色。
results.example_en: She eats an apple every day.

results.definition_en: A curve made over an opening, like over a door or bridge.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 拱、拱門;跨越開口的弧形結構。
results.example_en: There is a stone arch over the gate.

results.definition_en: The part of the body from the shoulder to the hand.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 手臂;自肩至手的身體部位。
results.example_en: She held the baby in her arm.

results.definition_en: A great group of people trained to fight in war.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 軍隊;受訓參與戰爭的大型團體。
results.example_en: The army goes to the field at sunrise.
results.example_zh_tw: 軍隊在日出時開赴前線。

results.definition_en: A very small new child.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 嬰兒;剛出生不久的幼兒。
results.example_en: The baby is asleep in the bed.

results.definition_en: A soft thing made of cloth or skin, used to keep or carry things.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 袋、包;以布或皮製成、用以盛物或攜帶之物。
results.example_en: Put your books in the bag.

results.definition_en: A round thing used for play.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 球;圓形的玩耍用品。
results.example_en: Kick the ball to me.

results.definition_en: A thin flat strip; or a group of music players.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 帶子、樂團;薄長帶物或樂隊。
results.example_en: She wears a band on her hair.

results.definition_en: A wide round bowl, often used for water.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 盆、洗手台;寬廣的圓形容器，常裝水。
results.example_en: Wash your face in the basin.

results.definition_en: A container made of thin strips, used to carry things.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 籃子;以細條編成、用以盛物之容器。
results.example_en: She put eggs in the basket.

results.definition_en: A big container in which one washes the whole body.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 浴缸;可容人全身入內洗澡的大容器。
results.example_en: She takes a bath every night.

results.definition_en: A thing made for one to sleep on.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 床;供睡眠的家具。
results.example_en: Go to bed early tonight.

results.definition_en: A flying insect that gives honey, with a sharp end that can sting.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 蜜蜂;產蜜、會螫人的飛行昆蟲。
results.example_en: A bee flew into the flower.

results.definition_en: A round metal thing that makes a sound when hit or moved.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 鈴、鐘;受擊或搖動時發聲的金屬圓物。
results.example_en: The bell of the church rang at noon.

results.definition_en: A small soft fruit with seeds inside, often red or blue.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 莓果;柔軟有籽的小型水果，常為紅或藍色。
results.example_en: Pick berries in the wood.

results.definition_en: A small animal with wings and feathers, that flies.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 鳥;有羽翼可飛翔的小動物。
results.example_en: A small bird sat on the branch.

results.definition_en: The flat sharp part of a knife or other tool used for cutting.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 刀片、刃;刀或工具用以切割的扁平鋒利部分。
results.example_en: Be careful with the sharp blade.

results.definition_en: A flat piece of wood, often long and thin.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 木板、板;扁平、常為長薄的木片。
results.example_en: Put the food on the board.

results.definition_en: A small thing made to go on water, often with sails or an engine.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 船、小艇;用於水面航行的小型船隻。
results.example_en: We rowed the boat across the lake.

results.definition_en: One of the hard white parts inside the body of a person or animal.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 骨頭;體內堅硬的白色支撐結構。
results.example_en: She broke a bone in her leg.

results.definition_en: Pages of paper bound together, with words to read.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 書;裝訂成冊、供閱讀的紙頁。
results.example_en: I am reading a good book.

results.definition_en: A type of shoe that covers the foot and part of the leg.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 靴子;可覆蓋足部與小腿的鞋類。
results.example_en: Put on your boots before going out.

results.definition_en: A tall thin container, often of glass, used for liquid.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 瓶子;多為玻璃製、用以盛液之長形容器。
results.example_en: Pour water from the bottle.
